# AI Research Agent

> A professional-grade AI research platform delivering comprehensive, multi-source synthesized reports with real-time financial data integration.

## Overview
AI Research Agent is an AI-powered research platform that generates comprehensive research reports by synthesizing information from multiple sources, including real-time financial data.

## Key Features
- **Multi-source Research** — Synthesizes data from multiple information sources
- **Real-time Financial Data** — Integrates live financial market data into reports
- **Comprehensive Reports** — Generates detailed, professional-grade research documents
- **Search & Discovery** — Search-based research topic exploration
- **Rate Limiting** — Built-in API rate limiting for reliable operation

## Pages
- `/` — Landing page
- `/search/[id]` — Specific research report

## Tech Stack
- Next.js (App Router)
- AI/LLM Integration
- TypeScript
